languages.text: "Лорд-капитан". {n}Абеляр слегка откашливается.{/n} "После того, как достопочтенный манипулус Фебрус исцелил имплантационный трон в Секторе Бионика, машинные духи, обитавшие в реликвии, явили нам нечто необычное".
languages.translation_comment:
Условия показа:
1. Игрок завершил FixAugmentationThrone_quest и починил трон
2. Совершен один варп-прыжок после завершения квеста
3. Абеляр в пати

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан". {n}Абеляр слегка откашливается.{/n} "Бои последних дней были тяжелыми. Как ваш сенешаль, рекомендую пройти полную проверку здоровья в Секторе Бионика".

languages.translation_comment:
Условия показа:
1. Игрок завершил FixAugmentationThrone_quest и починил трон
2. Совершен один варп-прыжок после завершения квеста
3. Абеляр в пати

languages.text: "Lord Captain." {n}Abelard coughs slightly.{/n} "Following the rites of healing performed by the esteemed Manipulus Februs upon the implantation throne in the Sector Bionica, the machine spirits dwelling within the relic revealed something extraordinary to us."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан". {n}Абеляр слегка откашливается.{/n} "После того, как достопочтенный манипулус Фебрус исцелил имплантационный трон в Секторе Бионика, машинные духи, обитавшие в реликвии, явили нам нечто необычное".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain." {n}Abelard coughs slightly.{/n} "After the esteemed Manipulus Februs restored the implantation throne in the Sector Bionica, the machine spirits inhabiting the relic revealed something unusual to us."

"Lord Captain." {n}Abelard coughs slightly.{/n} "Following the rites of healing performed by the esteemed Manipulus Februs upon the implantation throne in the Sector Bionica, the machine spirits dwelling within the relic revealed something extraordinary to us."

"Lord Captain." {n}Abelard coughs slightly.{/n} "After the esteemed Manipulus Februs restored the implantation throne in the Sector Bionica, the machine spirits inhabiting the relic revealed something unusual to us."

"Lord Captain." {n}Abelard coughs slightly.{/n} "Following the rites of healing performed by esteemed Manipulus Februs upon the implantation throne in the Sector Bionica, the machine spirits dwelling within the relic revealed something extraordinary to us."

"Lord Captain." {n}Abelard coughs slightly.{/n} "Following the rites of healing performed by the esteemed Manipulus Februs upon the implantation throne in the Sector Bionica, the machine spirits dwelling within the relic revealed something extraordinary to us."

languages.text: 「キャプテン様。」{n}アベルは軽く咳払いをした。{/n}「ここ数日の戦いは大変でした。あなたのセネシャルとして、セクター・ビオニカで健康診断を受けることをお勧めします」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain." {n}Abelard coughs slightly.{/n} "The battles of the last few days have been hard. As your Seneschal, I recommend you undergo a full health review in the Sector Bionica."

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan." {n}Abelard hafifçe öksürüyor.{/n} "Saygıdeğer Manipülus Februs'un Sektör Biyonika'daki implantasyon tahtı üzerinde gerçekleştirdiği iyileştirme ayinlerinin ardından yadigârın içinde yaşayan makine ruhları bize olağanüstü bir şey gösterdi."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain." {n}Abelard coughs slightly.{/n} "Following the rites of healing performed by the esteemed Manipulus Februs upon the implantation throne in the Sector Bionica, the machine spirits dwelling within the relic revealed something extraordinary to us."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan." {n}Abelard hafifçe öksürüyor.{/n} "Saygıdeğer Manipülus Februs'un Sektör Biyonika'daki implantasyon tahtı üzerinde gerçekleştirdiği iyileştirme ayinlerinin ardından yadigârın içinde yaşayan makine ruhları bize olağanüstü bir şey gösterdi."

languages.text: “舰长大人。”{n}阿贝拉德轻咳一声。{/n}“在尊贵的操纵者费布鲁斯为仿生区的移植王座执行完治疗仪式之后，栖居于那圣物里的机魂向我们揭示了一件非同小可的事。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain." {n}Abelard coughs slightly.{/n} "Following the rites of healing performed by the esteemed Manipulus Februs upon the implantation throne in the Sector Bionica, the machine spirits dwelling within the relic revealed something extraordinary to us."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人。”{n}阿贝拉德轻咳一声。{/n}“在尊贵的操纵者费布鲁斯为仿生区的移植王座执行完治疗仪式之后，栖居于那圣物里的机魂向我们揭示了一件非同小可的事。”

languages.text: "Lord Captain." {n}Abelard hüstelt.{/n} "Nachdem der geschätzte Manipulus Februs die Riten der Heilung auf den Implantationsthron im Sektor Bionica angewandt hatte, offenbarten uns die Maschinengeister des Reliktes etwas wirklich Außergewöhnliches."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain." {n}Abelard coughs slightly.{/n} "Following the rites of healing performed by the esteemed Manipulus Februs upon the implantation throne in the Sector Bionica, the machine spirits dwelling within the relic revealed something extraordinary to us."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain." {n}Abelard hüstelt.{/n} "Nachdem der geschätzte Manipulus Februs die Riten der Heilung auf den Implantationsthron im Sektor Bionica angewandt hatte, offenbarten uns die Maschinengeister des Reliktes etwas wirklich Außergewöhnliches."

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, » {n}commence Abélard avec un léger toussotement.{/n} Suite aux rituels mécaniques accomplis par le vénérable manipulus Februs sur le fauteuil d'implantation du secteur Bionica, les esprits de la machine qui habitent la relique ont été sources d'une incroyable révélation. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain." {n}Abelard coughs slightly.{/n} "Following the rites of healing performed by the esteemed Manipulus Februs upon the implantation throne in the Sector Bionica, the machine spirits dwelling within the relic revealed something extraordinary to us."

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, {n}commence Abélard avec un léger toussotement.{/n} Suite aux rituels mécaniques accomplis par le vénérable manipulus Februs sur le fauteuil d'implantation du secteur Bionica, les esprits de la machine qui habitent la relique ont été sources d'une incroyable révélation. »

languages.text: «Lord Capitán». {n}Abelard tose discretamente.{/n} «Tras la celebración de los ritos curativos oficiados por el estimado manipulus Februs para sanar el trono de implantación del Sector Bionica, los espíritus máquina que habitaban la reliquia nos revelaron algo extraordinario».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain." {n}Abelard coughs slightly.{/n} "Following the rites of healing performed by the esteemed Manipulus Februs upon the implantation throne in the Sector Bionica, the machine spirits dwelling within the relic revealed something extraordinary to us."

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán». {n}Abelard tose discretamente.{/n} «Tras la celebración de los ritos curativos oficiados por el estimado manipulus Februs para sanar el trono de implantación del Sector Bionica, los espíritus máquina que habitaban la reliquia nos revelaron algo extraordinario».
